_comment: BLANK TEMPLATE — same shape as demo-model.json with emptied/placeholder values. Replace every [bracketed] label and every 0 with real figures. Money in $000s. Negatives with a minus sign. Do NOT add computed fields (margins, totals, %, gross, ev) — compute.py derives those. See references/data-schema.md.

trend._comment: 13 months oldest->newest. months as MM-YY. Last entry is the current reporting month. Enter revenue & ebitda in $000s; margin is auto-computed.

summary._comment: Two consolidated views. monthRev/Ebt come from the last trend entry. Enter prior-month/prior-year comparatives and YTD/LTM totals; deltas & margins are auto-computed.

asReported.basis: Includes all entities owned in the period.

pnl._comment: One row per operating company plus a Head Office row. Enter rev/cos/staff/prof/sm/subs/ebitda in $000s; gross, margin and the Consolidated row are auto-computed. color = hex used in charts.

byCompanyMonth._comment: Current month vs prior month / prior year, plus TTM and a 6-point sparkline. cur/priorMo/priorYr/ttm in $000s; mom/yoy and the Consolidated total are auto-computed.

byCompanyYTD._comment: Year-to-date per company. rev/ebitda in $000s. revYoY/ebitdaYoY are percentages you enter (or null if no prior-year base). consolRevYoY/consolEbitdaYoY are consolidated %s. budgetRev/budgetEbitda in $000s. Totals & vs-budget are auto-computed.

revenueTrend._comment: Bullets shown beside the monthly revenue chart. .. bold is supported.

ebitdaTrend._comment: Bullets shown beside the Adj. EBITDA & margin chart.

bridge._comment: YoY Adj. EBITDA waterfall: one item per driver, value = YoY $000s contribution (negative = drag). start/end endpoints are auto-computed from summary & trend.

mix._comment: Note shown under the portfolio-mix donuts. The donut data itself is auto-computed from pnl.companies.

matrix._comment: Value-creation bubble chart. x = revenue growth %, y = TTM margin %, size = TTM revenue ($000s). axis ranges frame the plot.

fcf._comment: FCF roll-up. Enter value ($000s) on each kind:line row (negatives with a minus sign). Leave value off kind:subtotal and kind:total rows — they are auto-summed.

fund._comment: Fund holdings. rev/ebitda in $000s, ownership as a percent. tinyLPInterest = Tiny's LP % of the fund. margins, attributable amounts and LP totals are auto-computed.

sotp._comment: Sum-of-the-parts valuation. ttmEbitda ($000s) x multiple = segment EV (auto). netDebt in $000s, tinyEquityPct = Tiny's % of equity value. EV total, equity value and the Tiny/NCI split are auto-computed.
